svg.text: • 215. Kth Largest Element — quickselect or min-heap of size k
• 347. Top K Frequent Elements — counter + min-heap
• 692. Top K Frequent Words — comparator with frequency + lex order
• 23. Merge k Sorted Lists — heap of (value, list-pointer)
• 378. Kth Smallest in Sorted Matrix — heap or binary-search on value
• 373. K Smallest Pairs — heap with deduplication
• 295. Find Median from Data Stream — max-heap + min-heap
• 480. Sliding Window Median — two heaps + lazy deletion
• 1631. Path with Minimum Effort — Dijkstra over grid
• 743. Network Delay Time — single-source shortest path
Heap is the universal substrate for "next best by priority".
